projects.title: ERP System Overhaul
descriptions: Revitalized the ERP system's user interface, resulting in streamlined workflows and enhanced user satisfaction.
Architected a robust RESTful server to facilitate seamless communication between the UI and backend database systems.
Led database optimization initiatives—including cleaning and migration strategies—to significantly improve system performance
Developed a new patient management system that reduced the time required to manage patient records by 30%.
Collaborated with a team of 5 developers to design and implement a new inventory management system, resulting in a 20% reduction in inventory costs.
